generated_pair.question: What type of infrastructure component does this Terraform tutorial provision on AWS?
supporting_sentences: In this tutorial, you will use Terraform to provision an EC2 instance on Amazon Web Services (AWS). EC2 instances are virtual machines running on AWS and a common component of many infrastructure projects.

edited_pair.question: What type of infrastructure component does this Terraform tutorial provision on AWS?
supporting_sentences: In this tutorial, you will use Terraform to provision an EC2 instance on Amazon Web Services (AWS). EC2 instances are virtual machines running on AWS and a common component of many infrastructure projects.

generated_pair.question: What is the name of the directory created for the Terraform configuration in this tutorial?
supporting_sentences: Create a new directory for the Terraform configuration you will use in this tutorial.

edited_pair.question: What is the name of the directory created for the Terraform configuration in this tutorial?
supporting_sentences: Create a new directory for the Terraform configuration you will use in this tutorial.

generated_pair.question: What is the version constraint specified for the AWS provider in the Terraform configuration?
supporting_sentences: The  version  argument sets a version constraint for your AWS provider. If you do not specify a version constraint, Terraform defaults to the most recent version of the provider. We recommend using version constraints to ensure that Terraform does not install a version of the provider that you have not tested with your configuration. The string  ~> 5.92  means your configuration supports any version of the provider with a major version of  5  and a minor version greater than or equal to  92 .

generated_pair.question: What AWS region is specified in the provider block of the Terraform configuration?
supporting_sentences: The  provider  block configures the  aws  provider. The label of the provider block corresponds to the name of the provider in the  required_providers  list in your  terraform  block.

edited_pair.question: What AWS region is specified in the provider block of the Terraform configuration?

generated_pair.question: What is the instance type specified for the AWS EC2 instance in the Terraform configuration?
supporting_sentences: The  instance_type  argument hardcodes  t2.micro  as the type, which qualifies for the AWS free tier.
resource  "aws_instance"  "app_server"  {  ami  = data.aws_ami.ubuntu.id  instance_type  =  "t2.micro"  tags  = {  Name  =  "learn-terraform"  } }
